title: Venezuelan Comforting Garlicky Pilaf
description: A hearty, comforting Venezuelan-inspired pilaf dish infused with the depth of garlic, perfect for a cozy meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the rice and cook for 2-3 minutes until lightly toasted.
Add the chicken broth, cumin, salt, and pepper.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
